description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved handle made of wood or composite material, with a dark grip section for improved handling. The head of the axe is metallic, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite end, suitable for both chopping and hammering tasks. The blade edge is straight and sharp, designed for efficient cutting, while the poll is squared off for striking. The handle transitions smoothly into the head, suggesting a secure and traditional mounting style. The color palette includes dark gray, brown, and black, giving the tool a utilitarian and durable appearance. No visible markings or branding are present on the surface.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a curved wooden or composite handle and a broad, metallic wedge-shaped blade, featuring a dark grip and a flat poll for striking.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the front, highlighting the curved handle and the full profile of the blade and poll.
description_view_1: A side view showing the full length of the handle and the thin, sharp edge of the blade.
description_view_2: A top-down view emphasizing the width of the blade and the handle's curvature.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, displaying the handle's length and the flat poll of the axe head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved handle, likely wood or composite, with a dark, textured grip section; oval cross-section for ergonomic hold.
attribute_blade_design: Single wedge-shaped blade with a straight edge and a squared poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting, with the blade fitted securely onto the handle.
